Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono seems to have stepped out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}My darling's not home today, and I'm so lonely...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm, maybe I'll have dinner with Ms. Toriumi. We could go to that restaurant with the interesting game...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}What was it called again...? A mahjong parlor?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope I don't lose again... But I don't think there's any way I can win against Ms. Toriumi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ms. Toriumi isn't here. I was just about to look for her myself, actually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's very intriguing. The technical terms, in particular, are quite interesting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I play too much, I can't stop thinking about them for days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Mentan pin doradora! Riichi ippatsu chiitoitsu tsumo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've said that stuff even in my sleep... My poor darling hasn't slept very well as a result.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Shall I teach you the other technical terms? Though I'd just be repeating what Ms. Toriumi taught me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, for beginners, there's "Only riichi!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then a few intermediate phrases, such as "I got a reverse dora!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}"Looks like you're waiting for one tile," or "You've gotta have more than two han."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ooh, or advanced stuff... "You have a hand, don't you?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}"I have all the tiles you're waiting for," and "Mangan booyah!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}...So far, I've only had chances to use the beginners' phrases, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}But Ms. Toriumi is a very patient teacher. She'll tell me, "You should throw this one away," or...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}"You won't get many points if you call that one, so I wouldn't," and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}"I dropped that tile by accident, so you can't ron it"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1583 0 -1 -1 0 0}She's taught me so much, but I haven't been able to win a single match.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned technical terms for mahjong...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono doesn't seem to be returning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to give up for today[n]{f 1 1}
